message:
fix(grpc): reference-count HealthReporters to prevent premature status clear

HealthReporter::drop() previously cleared the service status
unconditionally, meaning the first dropped reporter would remove the
status even if other reporters for the same service were still active.

The fix adds a reporter_counts map to HealthService:
- acquire_reporter(): increments the count on construction
- release_reporter(): decrements on drop, returns true only when the
  last reporter for that service is released
- Drop only calls clear_status() when release_reporter() returns true

This enables multiple concurrent reporters for the same service name
(e.g., multiple gRPC server instances reporting health for "myservice")
without interference.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
